series_metadata.series_description: Requests to DAS Payroll to generate a manual paycheck for an employee due to an error that shorts the individual what is owed them by the Board of Pharmacy.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. If Federal funds are involved, retain for 3 years unless there is a finding. Then retain until after the finding is resolved. Shred., Paper: Shred
